log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Elf — Bardic Musician.
→ Elf — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 15 necrotic damage (half).
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Elf — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:9+12=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 fire damage. Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
